item_description: To analyze the spectral power in sleep stages, periods, cycles, hours according to your needs.

steps.name: Input Files
steps.description:
Add the PSG files you want to perform the analysis on.

The PSG file and the accessory file must share the same filename and folder.

Open your files:
.edf : .tsv file is optional.
.sts : .sig file is mandatory.
.eeg for CEAMS user : NATUS subject folder is mandatory


Select the montage and channels

steps.name: Events to exclude
steps.description:
Select events to exclude from the analysis (i.e. artifacts).

Start by selecting one PSG or multiple files (with the ctrl key pressed), then select an event group or name.

Be aware that the files must still be highlighted in the GUI to apply the 'Select All' option.

steps.name: Filter Settings
steps.description: Define the EEG filtering of your study.

steps.name: Section Selection
steps.description: Select the sections i.e. events, sleep stage and/or period to perform the analysis on.

steps.name: Annotations Selection
steps.description:
Select the annotations to perform the analysis on.

Start by selecting one PSG or multiple files (with the ctrl key pressed), then select an event group or name.

Be aware that the files must still be highlighted in the GUI to apply the 'Select All' option.

steps.name: Spectral Settings
steps.description: Define the spectral settings of the analysis for your study

steps.name: Output Files
steps.description: Define the analysis output files for your study.

list.name: Hours and Cycles
list.description: Define the maximum number of hours and cycles to report.

alias.tooltip: List of aliases separated by a semicolon(;) character

file_selection_only.tooltip: Set it to 1 if you only need to select a file and not its montages and channels.

parameters.name: parameters
